CONTENT.Career: Awoudja made his professional debut for VfB Stuttgart in the 2. Bundesliga on 26 July 2019, coming on as a substitute in the 35th minute for the injured Marcin Kamiński in the home match against Hannover 96. Four minutes later, he scored an own goal to reduce the lead for Stuttgart to 2–1.On 31 January 2021, Awoudja was loaned to Türkgücü München until the end of the season.On 31 August 2022, Awoudja signed with Excelsior.
CONTENT.Personal life: Awoudja was born in Munich, Bavaria and is of Togolese descent.
CONTENT.External links: Maxime Awoudja – UEFA competition record (archive)Maxime Awoudja at DFB (also available in German)Maxime Awoudja at kicker (in German)

SUMMARY: Maxime Aglago Awoudja (born 2 February 1998) is a German professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Regionalliga Nordost club Rot-Weiß Erfurt. He has represented Germany at U19, U20, and U21 youth levels.
